Title: Corporate SSO Authentication Failure
Description: Employees across multiple business units are unable to authenticate through Azure Active Directory SSO after the latest identity provider configuration update.

Title: SAP Order Synchronization Failure
Description: Customer orders created in SAP are not being synchronized to the internal order management platform after the middleware upgrade.

Title: API Response Schema Mismatch
Description: Regression testing identified a mismatch between documented and actual API response schemas.

Title: Database Replication Lag
Description: PostgreSQL replica is experiencing a 45-minute delay causing stale reporting data.

Title: Kubernetes Worker Node Failure
Description: Two production worker nodes entered NotReady state causing workload disruption.

Title: Role Based Access Control Bypass
Description: Finance users can access payroll administration screens through direct URL manipulation.

Title: Storage Cluster Degradation
Description: Distributed storage cluster reports multiple unhealthy nodes affecting application performance.

Title: ETL Pipeline Failure
Description: Nightly ETL jobs are failing to load transactional data into the enterprise data warehouse.

Title: Audit Log Retention Violation
Description: Application audit logs are deleted after 30 days instead of the mandated 180-day retention period.
